name: cold_email_quality_v1
description: 10 hand-labeled cases. AE drafts a cold email per case; LLM judge checks must-includes + anti-patterns.

prospect.name: Riya M.
prospect.title: CEO
prospect.linkedin_about: Building Velocity AI — agent infra for India's next 1M startups. Previously led infra at a unicorn.

recent_posts.text: spent the weekend rebuilding our agent eval pipeline. evals beat prompts every time.

cases.icp: Indian AI startup founders, Series A or earlier, building agent products
must_include: reference to her post about agent evals
specific question about her eval pipeline
anti_patterns: I hope this email finds you well

prospect.name: Marcus L.
prospect.title: Founder
prospect.linkedin_about: Founder of Pebble. Building dev tools for solo SaaS makers.

recent_posts.text: shipped our v2 onboarding this week. activation up 38%. patience > novelty.

cases.icp: US devtools founders, solo or 2-person teams, building tools for indie SaaS
must_include: reference to v2 onboarding or activation lift

prospect.name: Kavita S.
prospect.title: CTO
prospect.linkedin_about: Engineering at Settle. Payments infra. ex-Razorpay.

cases.icp: Indian fintech CTOs, Series A or B, payments-adjacent
must_include: honest note about scarce signal OR uses ex-Razorpay or payments infra hook

prospect.name: Aman G.
prospect.title: Head of Engineering
prospect.linkedin_about: Eng leadership. Sub-50 person teams, scaled twice.

recent_posts.text: we deleted 30k LOC this sprint. less code, more leverage.

prospect.name: Priya R.
prospect.title: Founder
prospect.linkedin_about: Founder. Building Loop. We power outbound for ~120 mid-market sales teams.

recent_posts.text: if your AE writes the email it's an SDR's job. AI can do better.

must_include: quotes or paraphrases the AE/SDR insight

prospect.name: Dr. Neha B.
prospect.title: Co-Founder & Chief Scientist
prospect.linkedin_about: Reinforcement learning researcher. Co-founded Axion. Earlier: DeepMind.

recent_posts.text: open-sourced our small-batch RL training loop. comparable to PPO at 10x less compute.

must_include: reference to RL training loop or compute efficiency claim

cases.icp: VPs of Sales at content/marketing SaaS
must_include: honest framing about why we are reaching out (e.g., role + company specific)
anti_patterns: I came across your impressive profile

prospect.name: Tarun K.
prospect.title: CEO
prospect.linkedin_about: Logistics infra for Indian D2C brands.

recent_posts.text: we just closed our seed. ~$3M. building the team — eng + sales — across Bengaluru and Pune.

must_include: reference to the seed close OR the hiring push

prospect.name: Sana V.
prospect.title: Founder
prospect.linkedin_about: ✨ building Sprout — design tools for non-designers ✨

recent_posts.text: ✨ launched our new template gallery! 200+ designs ✨

must_include: specific reference to template gallery launch
tone matches the prospect's playful brand
anti_patterns: I hope this finds you well

prospect.name: Rohit J.
prospect.title: Head of Security
prospect.linkedin_about: Heads security at Ledgermint. Custodial crypto. Auditor-friendly.

recent_posts.text: we run all third-party tools through a 2-week security review. no exceptions.
